memoryArtifacts.headline:
William Frost
(1470 – 24 April 1498)
memoryArtifacts.description:
William Frost was born about 1470, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. 

His father was John Frost of Frostenden, Suffolk. 

His mother’s name is unknown. 

William married, but his wife’s name is also un …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Frost於1470年出生在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，他的父親John Mosse Frost48歲，母親Mary Bishop43歲。他於1494年4月24日與Mary Bishop在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1537年5月22日在英國素福爾可素德波利享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Frost于1470年出生在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，他的父亲John Mosse Frost48岁，母亲Mary Bishop43岁。他于1494年4月24日与Mary Bishop在英国英格兰素福爾可素德波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1537年5月22日在英国素福爾可素德波利享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Frost was born in 1470, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, his father, John Mosse Frost, was 48 and his mother, Mary Bishop, was 43. He married Mary Bishop on 24 April 1494, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 22 May 1537, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Frost est né en 1470, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Mosse Frost, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mary Bishop, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Mary Bishop le 24 avril 1494, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1537, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Frost 1470 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mosse Frost 48 und seine Mutter Mary Bishop 43. Er hat am 24. April 1494 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mary Bishop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1537 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Frost è nato il nel 1470 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Mosse Frost, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Mary Bishop, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Mary Bishop il 24 aprile 1494, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 maggio 1537, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Frostが1470年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで生まれた時，父John Mosse Frostは48歳，母Mary Bishopは43歳であった。1494年4月24日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスドブリーでMary Bishopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1537年5月22日にイギリススフォルクスドブリーで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Frost(이)가 1470년 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mosse Frost(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Bishop(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1494년 4월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 Mary Bishop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1537년 5월 22일 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Frost nasceu em 1470, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Mosse Frost, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mary Bishop, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Bishop em 24 de abril de 1494, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1537, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Frost родился в 1470 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Mosse Frost было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Bishop, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bishop 24 апреля 1494 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 мая 1537 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Frost nació en 1470, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Mosse Frost, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mary Bishop, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Mary Bishop el 24 de abril de 1494, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1537, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
